warnings.detail: Exact metadata still requires a direct verification fetch.

Inspect credentials, endpoints, deployment artifacts and sensitive configuration before migration.
Inspect secrets, business data and unique domain logic before any family consolidation.
Security/authentication repository. Inspect secrets, credentials, endpoints, user data and deployment configuration before any migration or consolidation; do not expose sensitive values in reports.
Size equality is not evidence of duplicate content. Commit and tree comparison is required.
Review secrets, authentication configuration, connection strings, endpoints, deployment files and private business logic before migration.

Face-recognition material may involve biometric datasets, privacy restrictions and model/dataset licenses. Do not infer deployability from public visibility.

Owner reports that the job repeatedly fails and wants it stopped. Disable the deployed/scheduled job through the operational environment, not by mutating source during this read-only audit. Preserve the repository and inspect current files plus full history without exposing secrets.

Owner confirms this is the most important project. Preserve independently, prioritize architecture/dependency/recovery analysis, and inspect generated assets, binaries, credentials, deployment configuration and private offer/business data.

Confirmed as the .NET 5 ERP backend paired with an Angular frontend. It contains features needed for restoration. Do not archive or reduce it to a generic sample; map API contracts, database schema, dependencies and security configuration.
Determine upstream provenance and licenses; review server permissions, command execution and credential handling before reuse.
